keep_disabled_rationale: strict_success_but_net_zero: R1c rd_native is byte-exact vs the native reference (candidate engages, causes no device removal on any leg, max_abs=0), but on this gate scene the deepest-corner instance (index 4095) is visible so the high-water-mark InstanceCount == the full count (4096); the candidate scratch command buffer is byte-identical to the live one and net draw-count reduction is exactly 0 (a property of the visible-tail scene, not a weakness of the fix)

no_per_pass_bench_ratio_evidence: gate-met (strict success) is not net benefit; a measurable draw-count reduction requires a scene whose instance-array tail is off-screen or GRX-016 transform compaction, neither of which is delivered in this milestone; default_enable_state stays disabled and performance_claim stays none even on strict success

retraction.retracted_conviction: a general RDG same-frame compute-written DISPATCH_INDIRECT buffer consumed by a same-frame indirect draw removes the device on this backend
retraction.actual_root_cause: MISALIGNED RenderingDevice::buffer_clear: clearing each surface's instance-count dword at byte offset (s*5+1)*4 = 4/24/44 (never a multiple of 16) lowers to a RAW buffer UAV whose byte offset violates D3D12_RAW_UAV_SRV_BYTE_ALIGNMENT (16) and removes the device (0x887A0005); NOT an RDG architecture gap

two_reproducers.misaligned_buffer_clear_real_culprit: spike/godot-rurix/upstream-repro/rd-buffer-clear-misaligned-offset/ (offset 4/8/12/20/36 removes the device frame 1; offset 0/16/32/48 clean; perfect offset % 16 law, no compute/draw involved)
two_reproducers.pure_compute_to_indirect_FALSIFIED: spike/godot-rurix/upstream_bug_repro/ (compute UAV-write of a DISPATCH_INDIRECT buffer consumed same-frame by draw_list_draw_indirect runs 300 frames clean)

fix_chain.r1b: patch 0046 revision: keep the Rurix-owned scratch indirect decoupling and replace the misaligned per-surface count-dword buffer_clear with an aligned buffer_copy from a persistent 16-byte all-zero SSBO (CopyBufferRegion has no RAW-UAV alignment constraint); breaks the device-removal wall (rb5), exposes a downstream over-cull correctness finding
fix_chain.r1c: container-only kernel change (no 0046/b0/RTS0/descriptor/exe change): per-surface count write from InterlockedAdd(+1) count-of-visible to high-water-mark InterlockedMax(instance+1) so the prefix draw [0..InstanceCount-1] covers every visible instance and never over-culls

retraction.note: The prior 'Rationale — R1 终裁' prose in the .md is retained verbatim for the audit trail and banner-marked SUPERSEDED; this JSON records the retraction machine-readably.

upstream_bug_report_candidate: Godot 4.7 D3D12 driver misaligned RenderingDevice::buffer_clear (RAW buffer UAV byte offset not 16-aligned removes the device); DRAFT spike/godot-rurix/upstream-repro/ISSUE_DRAFT.md (for owner to file)
does_not_imply: default pass enablement (net-zero on this scene, no per-pass bench ratio evidence)
1.5x strict close-out gate satisfied (Amdahl 1.0669x ceiling unchanged; compaction magnitude assessed single-digit percent on this bench)
